meta.timing_decision_rule: B if same_sign and consistency_ratio>=0.55 and dispersion<=0.006 and abs(mean_daily)>=0.00025; else A
meta.decision_price_rule: B-up multiply factor by 1.05; B-down multiply factor by 0.95; A compress factor distance to today by 50%
